# Madeira Originals

> Premium streetwear and custom apparel brand born in São Vicente, Madeira. Inspired by Madeira, designed for everywhere. 0% tourist trap.

Madeira Originals operates two lanes: a retail streetwear line (tees, hoodies, accessories, stickers) and a Production Studio offering DTF printing, UV DTF stickers, custom apparel, and rally/performance graphics for businesses and teams.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand overview and featured collections.
- [Shop](/shop): Full streetwear and apparel catalogue.
- [Madeira T-Shirts](/madeira-t-shirts): Heavyweight cotton tees with island-rooted graphics.
- [Madeira Hoodies](/madeira-hoodies): Atlantic-weight hoodies built for Madeira's microclimates.
- [Madeira Accessories](/madeira-accessories): Caps, totes, beanies, and small island essentials.
- [Madeira Stickers](/madeira-stickers): Durable die-cut UV DTF stickers.
- [Madeira Streetwear](/madeira-streetwear): The full streetwear line.
- [Madeira Gifts](/madeira-gifts): Curated gift selection from Madeira.
- [Production Studio](/production-studio): DTF, UV DTF, custom apparel, and team graphics for businesses.
- [Culture](/culture): Stories and inspiration from Madeira.
- [About](/about): Brand story, values, and team.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.
- [Journal](/journal): Articles on Madeira culture, design, and streetwear.

## Optional

- [Best Souvenirs from Madeira](/journal/best-souvenirs-from-madeira)
